description_long: This object consists of four modern chairs arranged side by side, each featuring a minimalist design with gently curved wooden armrests and legs. The seats and backrests are made from molded materials, with three chairs in varying shades of gray and one in black, all with a smooth, slightly contoured surface for comfort. The armrests and legs are crafted from light-colored wood, providing a natural contrast to the seat colors. The chairs have a low profile and a sturdy, stackable construction, making them suitable for communal or waiting areas. The backrests are slightly reclined, and the armrests are integrated into the frame, giving the chairs a cohesive and contemporary appearance. These chairs are designed for durability and comfort, ideal for urban public spaces such as lobbies, parks, or outdoor cafes.
description: A set of four modern chairs with curved wooden armrests and legs, featuring smooth, contoured seats in shades of gray and black. The design is minimalist and stackable, suitable for urban public spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing all four chairs side by side, highlighting the color variations and the full shape of the armrests and backrests.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the profile of the chairs, emphasizing the curvature of the armrests and the stackable design.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the backrests and the alignment of the legs, with the wood grain and seat contours visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the profile and how the chairs nest together.
